title: Skeleton Screen

statement.markdown:
heading: {"text":"Skeleton Screen Challenge"}
description: Create a Skeleton Screen that transitions to a fully loaded state. The Skeleton Screen should have a dynamic loading animation that scales up, giving the user a sense of progress.
requirements
1. Use CSS Grid to create a skeleton of 3 rows with 2 columns each.
2. Implement a loading animation that scales up from 50% to 100% opacity over a duration of 3 seconds.
3. On page load or network event, start the animation from 0% opacity.
4. Use Tailwind CSS for styling.
5. Ensure the animation does not interfere with the layout of the actual content.

constraints: Use only HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Tailwind CSS is the only permitted CSS framework.
No external libraries or dependencies allowed.
Test in modern web browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari).
